title: Pedagogical Tools
text:
STA230 — Statistical Learning



Classification

LASSO

Random Forests

XGBoost

PCA

WebR



Classification, regression regularisation, and unsupervised learning. Interactive concept blocks, quizzes, and live R code — no installation needed.












STA240 — Advanced Statistical Methods



Mixed Models

Multinomial Regression

Ordinal Regression

WebR



Interactive case studies covering mixed models, multinomial regression, and ordinal regression. Run live R code directly in the browser — no installation needed.





No matching items

title: About
text:
These tools are developed for statistics courses at Gothenburg University. Each tool is a self-contained interactive site built with Quarto and WebR, allowing students to run R code directly in the browser without any installation.
Inspired by courses at the Department of Statistics, Gothenburg University. Content developed by Lovisa Johansson using AI-assisted authoring.
Contact: Lovisa Johansson · Gothenburg University
